pullRequest.title: Quest Patches 1.3.26
pullRequest.body: ### Changes: - Removed cotton misinfo from "New Threads" - Switched command recommendation in "Powerfail Notifications" - Removed mention of outdated basic Uncertainty Resolver - Added quest for Dislocator Inhibitor in MV tab - Removed misinfo about Oganesson replication being removed - Added note about dyed hatch priority - Gave extra detail in "Important Tools" for clarification - Deleted "Supersized Buses" quest since it's now redundant - Removed Bottle and Wire Extruder Shape requirements from MV Extruder Quest - Added LV Fluid Extractor req to a few LV quests - Added Lead Dust option to LV Lead quest - Deleted Zinc Gravel Ore quest & unify with "Options for finding Zinc" - Fixed ordering in "How to make rubber" - Fixed broken ceramics quests - Changed platinum processing quest numbers to align with whole dust recipes Fixes https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/12277 Contributes towards: https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/23111 #### New Dislocator Inhibitor Quest:

pullRequest.title: Makes primal crusher tooltip visible and functional
pullRequest.body: ### Changes: - This updates the mining level of the Primal Crusher to level 8. This makes concurrent sense given that it's a combination of 4 strong level 7 tools, having it at 5 SA & -1 ITT made it invisible. - Updates both the ITTweaks & Salis Arcana config with this information. (SA says 6, that's directly akin to 8) Currently all of the mining level info is concurrent within them both with the same and accurate information despite them doing the same thing. If this is something we wish to change by moving all items from one config to the other then we can do that but this is the status quo as it stands so I'm just maintaining that. This is open to change however, I'm not particularly swayed in one direction. This will close https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/14265 This was briefly discussed with @Nikolay-Sitnikov : https://discord.com/channels/181078474394566657/522098956491030558/1411856035593064448 ###In-Game:

pullRequest.title: remove large cells from the blocked items
pullRequest.body: This PR removes the large cells from being blocked by the game when you try to right click with them. They work correctly from what i can tell, and they were blacklisted 9 years ago, so probably something that got fixed without us noticing.

pullRequest.title: Split the Anvil Quest into 2
pullRequest.body:
Split the Anvil quest into 2, so you don't have to craft two at one time to finish the quest. You can craft one, and then a second quest unlocks to either craft a second one or retrieve it. This doesn't force the player to craft an extra anvil when they only need it for the Forge Hammer.

![New Anvil quest](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a110e9d8-7716-408f-b9a3-d8877706617e)

Closes: #19473

pullRequest.title: Fix tantalumhafniumcarbide disproportionate properties
pullRequest.body:
Used similar stats as Ademic Steel

Closes #19590 

**Disclaimer:** I doubted about removing the material altogether but i don't know what would happen to existing tools etc..., so I just used Ademic Steel and just tweaked it a bit (I got no idea about how is TiC stats usually balanced out)

pullRequest.title: Various Quest Cleanup Changes + Boot Trigger Quests
pullRequest.body:
### Changes:
- Changes the descriptions of Naq Fuel quests to lineup with current resource necessity https://discord.com/channels/181078474394566657/949447391587733504/1411424118049603707
- Changes void miner quest to lose the tritanium requirement (will add netherite requirement once quests are in) https://discord.com/channels/181078474394566657/949447391587733504/1411134387239518269
- Adds HV Chemical bath as an option for completing the EV Chemical bath quest, since processing ilmenite is not technically a necessity of main progression. Closes https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/21003
- Changes several quests in "Bio for the Masses" to have more accurate structure requirements, as well as making some structure blocks optional due to potential tier mismatch https://discord.com/channels/181078474394566657/949447391587733504/1410807159523901550
- Changes the layout of the new NEI quests to make them more appropriate for the zoomed out perspective https://discord.com/channels/181078474394566657/949447391587733504/1410763207039123466
- Added 3 Trigger quests with all thaum boot types in case one tier isn't "cashed in" before the next tier is infused by the player. Closes https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/20298
- Slight reorganization in Mass Processing to make things looks neater

pullRequest.title: Egg & SE Dependency Removal
pullRequest.body:
### Changes:
- Removes King Slime completion quest dependency for secret witchery infinity egg quest, all of the other boss requirements make sense for this quest but this one is out of left field
- Removes Tier 7 plate quest requirement for Space Elevator quest, this was inhibiting completion of the quest for anyone doing a no rocket run, and you need the T7 plates to make the item anyway so the quest dependency is doing nothing helpful. 

This will close https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/20723.

pullRequest.title: Phasing-Out Broken IC2 Crop Machines from Lootbags & Questbook
pullRequest.body: ### Changes: - Removes crop harvester and crop matron from lootbag rewards, these blocks are glitchy, they don't even drop themselves when broken, and the harvester didn't even have a crafting recipe. These have been replaced in the lootbags with the crop manager (LV) - Removes crop harvester quest, and replaces the crop matron quest with a crop manager quest, all parts of the quest besides requirement and description are the same This will close https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/20740 This works towards addressing this https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/20499 ### Crop-Manager Replacement Quest

pullRequest.title: Adds Adv. Circuit Board Skip & Corrects AFSU Quest
pullRequest.body:
### Changes:
- Adds Adv. Circuit board quest skip for people who went the scrapbox route (note, this does not skip the epoxy questline, just solely the advanced circuit board quest since they're technically obtained)
- Adds note in ACB quest to let player know about skip
- Removes GT++ tab wording from AFSU quest

This will close https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/20874

pullRequest.title: Quest Updates for "To Play God" and "Starting Fusion"
pullRequest.body:
### Changes:
- To play god required the location quest of travelling to Mars. I've changed it to require a bucket of bacterial sludge since that is the point of the quest and it allows for people who take the harder route by not going to Mars also able to complete the quest. I changed the description to account for this as well.
- The "Starting Fusion" quest now requires the Clarifier quest to unlock, since now it requires Netherite, which is dependent on obtaining Grade 1 water

This will close https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/20910
** Note on the issue, I decided not to change the rocket dependency for "Fusion Rocketry" or "Mysterious..." because they are not main quests and do not prohibit you from continuing down the line. I maintain that we will assist but not cater to challenge runs in the QB.

pullRequest.title: fix: disable new anvils from EFR
pullRequest.body:
Fixes https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/21271

Following the discussion on Discord: https://discord.com/channels/181078474394566657/401118216228831252/1418190294410723389

I think we should disable the new anvils from EFR due to known and potentially more uncovered issues.
It might be a good idea to check other block replacements from EFR too, especially ones that could be used in multiblocks for example.

pullRequest.title: fix spice of life formula
pullRequest.body:
fixes https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/21667

The SoL formula was buffed in https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/pull/19701. That is kept here of course.
It was then changed again in https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/pull/20247 with the goal to have diminishing returns for 1 hunger foods kick in after eating 5 times, not 9 times. However that PR did not actually do so but unintentionally drastically changed diminishing returns across the board. This is fixed here and the intentional behaviour implemented by using the formula from https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/pull/19701 but with a simple 1/MAX(food_hunger_value,2) instead of 1/food_hunger_value as the min value of the second part.

Tested with:
1 hunger foods: Can eat 5 times normally, then hunger returns goes to 0
2 hunger foods: Can eat 5 times normally, then hunger return goes to 1, and only after 10 (8+hungervalue) it goes to 0.

pullRequest.title: Quest Patches 4.9.2026
pullRequest.body:
## Changes: - Added new `Infinity Egg` quest to UHV & Look to the Edges - Added `Creative Mana Tablet` to UHV - Added `Does Anyone Still Use These` to UHV & change deps to AND - Added Raw Tengam Dust to `The Final Frontier!` - Fixed `Sapling Power` to be optional retrieval - Amended wording in `Waterproof Tech` - Removed note from `A T0 Rocket? What?` - Fixed grammar in `Rocket Tier 1` - Made `Damascus Steel` tasks OR - Added new `MV Wiremill` Quest to MV - Added new `Polycaprolactam` quest to MV - Removed fluid task from `Haha, Spinny Ingot` - Replaced fluid task from `Spacetime Splitting` - Lightly shuffled around `UHV` - Changed `Welcome to Tier 1, LV` to checkbox task - Removed colored title from `Starting Your AE2 Journey` - Changed shield casing requirements for `QFT` quests to 1 - Fixed Bonsai retrievability in `The Benzene Tier` - Added `Fire, Fire, Grandpa!` req to `Basic Processing` - Moved `Personal Dimension` to HV tab after `Titanium, Finally!` - Amended note in `Boots Are Made For Walking` - Amended description in `Argon` - Removed argon from optional task in `Naquadah Soped Monocrystalline Silicon` - Added note about Ineffable Glass to `Cleanroom` - Fixed grammar in `Pure Daisy` - Removed duplicate `Celestial Gateway` quest - Added `Concentrated Darkness` dep to `Planar Gateways` - Clarifies description of `Precise Assembler` - Fixes item counts in `Elite Circuit Board` - Changes `Nightshade` task to be non-optional - Gave `Space Modules Galore` a dep on Dimensionally Shifted Superfluid - Clarifies Import/Export behavior in `Fluid TP for Magic-Haters` - Aligned `A Stime a Dat Keeps the Doctor Awake` with wiki Electron Tube statistics - Adds QC reward for LV Brewery to `Way One: Brewery` - Overhauls `Molecular Transformer, finally!` to account for Structure Rework - Overhauls `Integrated Ore Factory - All in One!` to account for structure rework - Overhauls `Dancing In Circles` to account for Thermal Refinery structure rework - Overhauls `Bate Bate Chocolate` to account for Mixing Machine structure rework - Fixes `Too much Indium?` to use updated Flotation Cell controller from structure rework - Changed `Do You Hear That Engine Revving?` Tungstensteel dep to the earlier Tungstensteel dep - Exchanged Large Tungstensteel Boiler controller in `More Steam for Fuel` & `Super Fuel At The Top` & `Even More Steam? Are You Sure?` & `Hyperheated Steam` - Exchanged Large Bronze Boiler controller in `Two Big Ovens` & `It's Time to Get More Steam` - Exchanged Large Steel Boiler controller in `Steam is Never Enough` & `Large Steel Boiler` - Exchanged Large Titanium Boiler controller in `Mooooooore Steam` & `CBD Into Steam` & `Boiler and Super Fuel` - Exchanged IC2 solar panel with 1-Volt solar in `Power of the Sun 1x1` - Ameded description in `The Other Way` to not advertise Monazite line as being necessary - Ameded description of `Nether Quartz? Sharpness!` to reflect that Certus is now 4 per not 24 - Removed misinfo in `Large Hadron Collider` - Changed `L.A.T.E.X. Cable Coater` to align with name change to exocoater - Changed `Early Bird Gets the...Nightmare?` from 4 -> 3 on task items to better reflect potion brew quantity Unrelated: Fixes Bad coin amount in Vending Machine trade (65 -> 64) Closes https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/23975 Closes https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/21938 Closes https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/24106 Closes https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/24155 Closes https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/24184 Contributes Towards: https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/24100 | | | |---|---| | **UHV New**
| **Infinity Egg**
| | **MV Wiremill**
| **Polycaprolactam**
| | **Mixer**
| **Thermal Refinery**

pullRequest.title: Quest updates - 23 Oct
pullRequest.body: - fixes https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/22200 - fixes https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GT-New-Horizons-Modpack/issues/21954 - removed quests for no longer obtainable one ring - updated the early game advice quests (inventory tweaks is gone, Battlegear is gone, SU can now backup journeymap and similar folders) - general pass over many new quests (typos, color improvements, language improvements, less enchantments on reward bags, dont say a part of the game sucks, use warn/note correctly, don't invent another different tier coloring scheme, etc.) - fix order of smeltery quests. nothing on the multiblock quest tab should go from bottom to top. Now it is top to bottom. This is not intended for 2.8.x. Does not touch nuclear or coin tab, so won't interfere with the other current PRs.
